hero.title: About
hero.description: SecuriVA is an enterprise AI platform that combines automation, cybersecurity, and secure communication into one unified system. We help organizations operate faster, safer, and smarter through intelligent technology built for the modern digital world.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Modern businesses rely on dozens of disconnected tools to manage security, automation, and communication. This fragmentation creates complexity, increases risk, and slows innovation.
story.p2: SecuriVA was built to solve this problem. We created a unified platform that integrates AI-driven automation, enterprise-grade cybersecurity protection, and secure communication infrastructure into one intelligent ecosystem.
story.p3: Our goal is simple: provide organizations with a digital system that works continuously in the background — protecting data, automating operations, and enhancing productivity.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Empower organizations with secure AI systems that automate operations, protect digital assets, and enhance human productivity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A world where intelligent automation and cybersecurity work together seamlessly to enable safe and efficient digital transformation for every organization.

ai_agent.title: AI Virtual Agent
ai_agent.text: Automates workflows, communication, scheduling, and customer interactions using intelligent conversational AI.

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity Protection
cybersecurity.text: AI-driven defense systems monitor activity, detect threats, and secure enterprise environments in real time.

vpn.title: Secure AI Networking
vpn.text: Adaptive VPN and encrypted communication ensure safe connections across distributed teams and systems.

customer_ai.title: Customer Interaction AI
customer_ai.text: Manage calls, chats, and emails through an intelligent digital assistant available 24/7.

ebook.title: eBook & Training Generator
ebook.text: Create security awareness guides, documentation, and training materials instantly using AI.

integrations.title: Enterprise Integrations
integrations.text: Connect seamlessly with Gmail, Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and other enterprise tools.

steps.step1: Connect your business systems and tools
steps.step2: AI analyzes workflows and security posture

hero.description: AI Voice is SecuriVA’s advanced vocal intelligence module that converts speech into smart text, contextualized messages, translations, and automated actions. Users simply speak, and SecuriVA understands, reformulates, translates, analyzes, and executes.

q3.question: Do you provide enterprise deployment support?

hero.title: Cybersecurity
hero.description: At SecuriVA, cybersecurity is not an afterthought—it is embedded into every layer of the platform. From AI agents to automation workflows and VPN Secure Access, your data, communications, and customer interactions are protected, monitored, and compliant at all times.

video.title: Protect Your Business with AI-Driven Security and Compliance
video.description: SecuriVA ensures organizations of all sizes, across all industries, operate safely in a digital-first world.

encryption.label: Encryption Protocols
encryption.description: All communications, transactions, and stored data are encrypted using industry-standard methods, ensuring confidentiality and integrity.

threat.label: Threat Detection
threat.description: AI-driven monitoring continuously scans for anomalies, suspicious behavior, and potential cyberattacks in real-time.

vulnerability.label: Vulnerability Analysis
vulnerability.description: Regular automated and manual security audits identify weak points, with actionable recommendations to prevent breaches.

compliance.label: Compliance Standards Knowledge
compliance.description: SecuriVA aligns with regulations including GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS, ensuring your data handling meets legal and industry requirements.

partnership.footer: These partnerships ensure best-in-class security across every integration and workflow.

items: SIEM tools for continuous threat monitoring
Encryption protocols for data in transit and at rest
Training materials and documentation for compliance and incident response
resources.footer: With these resources, organizations can build internal security competence while relying on SecuriVA’s advanced protection.

Acting as a 24/7 digital team member, it manages calls, emails, texts, and chats while protecting your domain, website, and data. With built-in eBook creation and seamless integrations across leading business tools, SecuriVA helps organizations operate faster, stay secure, and deliver better customer experiences — all from a single platform.

items.question: What is SecuriVA?
items.answer: An AI platform that automates business tasks, enhances customer communication, and provides enterprise-grade cybersecurity.

items.question: Is SecuriVA secure?
items.answer: Yes—end-to-end encryption, threat detection, and compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS.

items.question: Can SecuriVA integrate with my tools?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA connects to Gmail, WhatsApp, Salesforce, APIs, and many more platforms.

items.question: Who can use SecuriVA?
items.answer: SMEs, enterprises, fintech, healthcare, education, e-commerce, and professionals needing automation.

items.question: Do you offer customer support?
items.answer: Yes—24/7 support, onboarding, and detailed documentation.

hero.subtitle: Powerful, Unified Intelligence for Every Industry

intro.paragraph1: Securiva delivers an all-in-one secure intelligence platform that transforms how organizations operate across every sector.
intro.paragraph2: Unlike traditional platforms that offer fragmented tools, Securiva provides an integrated end-to-end ecosystem where automation, protection, and intelligent communication work seamlessly together—backed by enterprise-grade security.

why.title: Why Securiva is Different
why.subtitle: Securiva stands apart through four fundamental value pillars

unified.title: Unified Intelligence Layer
unified.description: Most platforms provide either AI or security—not both. Securiva merges:
unified.footer: Everything works together in a single architecture.

adaptive.title: Industry-Adaptive AI
adaptive.description: The AI Virtual Agent automatically adapts to industry rules, workflows, compliance constraints, and communication standards.

zeroTrust.title: Zero-Trust Security at the Core
zeroTrust.description: Instead of adding security as an external layer, Securiva embeds cybersecurity into all interactions, automations, and data flows.

compliance.title: Compliance-Driven by Default
compliance.description: From healthcare privacy to financial regulations, Securiva ensures all automations and virtual interactions remain fully compliant.

sections.commitmentText: SecuriVA provides enterprise-grade reliability with continuous monitoring, rapid issue response, and proactive system health management to ensure uninterrupted operations.

security.title: Security & Privacy

steps.title: Submit Request
steps.description: Provide details about your issue, environment, and expected outcome.

steps.title: Issue Review
steps.description: Our engineers analyze logs, configuration, and system behavior.

steps.title: Resolution
steps.description: We provide fixes, recommendations, or guided troubleshooting.

q1.question: How do I connect Salesforce to SecuriVA?
q1.answer: After logging in, navigate to your dashboard and choose the integration setup option. Follow the authorization steps to connect your Salesforce environment securely.

q2.question: How quickly will I receive a response?
q2.answer: Standard support responses are provided within 24 hours. Enterprise support requests receive priority handling and faster response times.

q3.question: What information should I include in my request?
q3.answer: Include your environment details, steps to reproduce the issue, error messages, and expected behavior. This helps our engineers resolve your issue faster.

q4.question: Is my data secure when contacting support?
q4.answer: Yes. All support communications follow secure handling practices and confidentiality standards.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Support request submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.

integrationCards.description: VPN traffic is continuously scanned by SecuriVA’s AI threat intelligence.

integrationCards.label: Automation Workflows
integrationCards.description: Every automated task—internal or external—executes through a private, encrypted tunnel.

integrationCards.label: System Integrations (Gmail, WhatsApp, Salesforce, Banking APIs, Cloud Platforms, OpenAI, etc.)
integrationCards.description: All API calls route through a secure network layer for maximum confidentiality.

items.label: One-Click Secure Browsing
items.description: All communications—including email, chat, calls, and API requests—are routed through a secure encrypted tunnel with a single activation.
points: Automatic tunnel activation for AI workflows
items.footer: This protects all operational and customer data from interception, leakage, or unauthorized access.

items.label: AI Threat Detection Inside the VPN
items.description: SecuriVA introduces real-time AI scanning of all VPN traffic.
items.footer: This elevates VPN technology into proactive cybersecurity intelligence.

items.label: Adaptive Routing
items.description: The VPN dynamically chooses the fastest and safest server using AI-driven optimization.
items.footer: Ensures stable performance in global environments.

items.label: Compliance-Ready Protection
items.description: Supports GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS and other regulatory frameworks.

items.label: Integrated Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
items.description: SecuriVA enforces MFA and zero-trust checks for sensitive access.
items.footer: Only trusted users can access protected environments.

items.label: All-in-One Platform
items.footer: No need for separate tools or vendors.

items.label: Market Differentiation
items.closing: SecuriVA integrates AI + Cybersecurity + Private Network + Automation into one system.
items.footer: This makes SecuriVA a Secure AI Operations Platform.

final.title: Final Value Proposition
final.description: VPN Secure Access is a strategic security layer that transforms SecuriVA into an enterprise-grade automation and protection platform.
